sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73536" key="o(moboule/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμο-βουλέω</orth>, <sense id="n73536.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deliberate together,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.96e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
